signals.raw:
Just-confirmed breakdown (April 12):** US VP JD Vance announced after marathon Islamabad talks that Iran refused commitments on abandoning nuclear weapons and fully reopening the Strait (only 2 ships passed Friday); Iran called talks "intensive" but urged US to drop "excessive demands"; Trump dismissed outcome as making "no difference," signaling potential escalation[2][4].

No full ceasefire reso
